episodes.title: Hard Ground
episodes.description: The Brannock family faces its first drought in twenty years as bank pressure mounts.

episodes.title: Old Debts
episodes.description: Patriarch Earl Brannock makes a deal with a land developer he's trusted to regret.

episodes.title: The Fence Line
episodes.description: A disputed property boundary leads to the first act of violence between neighbors.

episodes.title: Three Sisters
episodes.description: Each of the three Brannock daughters takes a different path as the ranch fractures.

episodes.title: Water Rights
episodes.description: Control of the creek that runs through the property becomes the season's central conflict.

episodes.title: Hired Hand
episodes.description: A stranger arrives looking for work — and seems to know more about the family than he lets on.

episodes.title: Brand New Scar
episodes.description: A fire destroys the main barn. Arson is suspected; evidence points in uncomfortable directions.

episodes.title: Settlement
episodes.description: Legal proceedings begin over the land deal, forcing the family into public testimony.

episodes.title: The Breaking
episodes.description: A confrontation between Earl and the developer results in an irreversible act.

episodes.title: After the Storm
episodes.description: The family picks up pieces in the aftermath, changed in ways that can't be undone.

episodes.title: New Season
episodes.description: Two years have passed. The Brannocks are rebuilding — but old wounds haven't closed.

episodes.title: The Return
episodes.description: Eldest daughter Callie comes home after years away, disrupting a fragile equilibrium.

episodes.title: Calving Season
episodes.description: A brutal winter calving season tests every hand on the ranch to their limit.

episodes.title: Distant Thunder
episodes.description: Rumors of a larger land grab by a regional corporation reach the county.

episodes.title: The Coalition
episodes.description: The Brannocks try to organize neighboring ranches against the corporate threat.

episodes.title: Splinter
episodes.description: Internal disagreements fracture the coalition before it can act.

episodes.title: Last Acre
episodes.description: The Brannocks make their final stand at a county commission meeting.

episodes.title: What Remains
episodes.description: A quiet, earned finale — the land survives, but the family looks different now.

extras.title: Location: The High Plains
extras.description: A look at the Montana locations that anchor Prairie Storm's visual identity.

extras.title: The Brannock Family Tree
extras.description: A character guide tracing three generations of the Brannock family.
